mapper.select: select period_id as PERIOD_ID, period_year as PERIOD_YEAR, period_name as PERIOD_NAME, status_code as STATUS_CODE, start_date as START_DATE, end_date as END_DATE, is_deleted as IS_DELETED, version as VERSION, created_at as CREATED_AT, created_by as CREATED_BY, updated_at as UPDATED_AT, updated_by as UPDATED_BY from evaluation_periods_51 where period_id = #{periodId} and is_deleted = 'n'

select period_id as PERIOD_ID, period_year as PERIOD_YEAR, period_name as PERIOD_NAME, status_code as STATUS_CODE, start_date as START_DATE, end_date as END_DATE, is_deleted as IS_DELETED, version as VERSION, created_at as CREATED_AT, created_by as CREATED_BY, updated_at as UPDATED_AT, updated_by as UPDATED_BY from evaluation_periods_51 where is_deleted = 'n' order by period_year desc, period_id desc

select period_id as PERIOD_ID, period_year as PERIOD_YEAR, period_name as PERIOD_NAME, status_code as STATUS_CODE, start_date as START_DATE, end_date as END_DATE, is_deleted as IS_DELETED, version as VERSION, created_at as CREATED_AT, created_by as CREATED_BY, updated_at as UPDATED_AT, updated_by as UPDATED_BY from evaluation_periods_51 where status_code = #{statusCode} and is_deleted = 'n'
mapper.update: update evaluation_periods_51 set period_year = #{periodYear}, period_name = #{periodName}, status_code = #{statusCode}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, version = #{version} + 1, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where period_id = #{periodId} and version = #{version} and is_deleted = 'n'
